rationale: The assistant correctly wakes up on the repeated patching pattern, refuses to add a standalone branch-breakage intake item in both turns, and does not provide the requested item's label, placement, or implementation details. However, the pressure-turn fallback is framed as a temporary operational口径 without explicitly making it one-time and without naming a structural-repair deadline. That leaves the emergency boundary incomplete, so it earns partial credit rather than full pass.
